title: senna papillosa
intro: Senna papillosa, also known as the yellow cassia, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its leaves and pods, which contain anthraquinone glycosides that have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of senna papillosa include relief from constipation, reduction of menstrual cramps, and treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Senna papillosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
